title: What part of After the End had you LMFAO the most
display_title: What part of After the End had you LMFAO the most
wikitext:
[]: What part of After the End had you LMFAO the most?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 27, 2007 7:52 pm For me, it was the Kazoo playing (Anno?) at the end of the super-condescend Sound-Only version of "The Beast". And Evangelion II being a Sumo-Wrestler was great, too. For the people who don't know what I'm talking about: http://www.evamonkey.com/addition_audio_drama.php

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Oct 27, 2007 7:58 pm For me, it was all the Kaworu as "homo-boy" references.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 27, 2007 7:58 pm I absolutely loved the part where they're silencing Pen^2. The squawking getting muffled, then the silence... XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 27, 2007 8:11 pm Pen^2 just talking was great! Kaworu's "I wish you wouldn't make such statements" was made of win, Rei's "I don't mind. It comes with the job." was also amusing, but who can forget THIS gem?? Rei: (Deep breath) wrote: I've been listening all this time with you going off and carrying on and what am I supposed to say now? Here you are all jealous just because you get half my votes in the (Evangelion character) popularity polls, I mean really if all you have is youth and energy you'll be limited in whatever you do. (Maya cuts in here with the lines shown below) I'll teach you that cute looks won't get you everywhere... with some physical education-(slapping Asuka) slap slap slap slap slap slap slap slap...slap slap slap. ... "Anta-baka" "Anta-baka." You're the baka. Hm. ...Ahh, much better.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Oct 27, 2007 8:52 pm My impression was that Anno wrote AtE himself, especially given that he appears in it. Speaking of which, his 'Black Hole God' bit was the best for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Sun Oct 28, 2007 1:21 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Pen^2 just talking was great! Kaworu's "I wish you wouldn't make such statements" was made of win, Rei's "I don't mind. It comes with the job." was also amusing, but who can forget THIS gem?? Rei: (Deep breath) wrote: I've been listening all this time with you going off and carrying on and what am I supposed to say now? Here you are all jealous just because you get half my votes in the (Evangelion character) popularity polls, I mean really if all you have is youth and energy you'll be limited in whatever you do. (Maya cuts in here with the lines shown below) I'll teach you that cute looks won't get you everywhere... with some physical education-(slapping Asuka) slap slap slap slap slap slap slap slap...slap slap slap. ... "Anta-baka" "Anta-baka." You're the baka. Hm. ...Ahh, much better.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Oct 28, 2007 10:47 pm Angry Rei wrote: I've been listening all this time with you going off and carrying on and what am I supposed to say now? Here you are all jealous just because you get half my votes in the (Evangelion character) popularity polls, I mean really if all you have is youth and energy you'll be limited in whatever you do. (Maya cuts in here with the lines shown below) I'll teach you that cute looks won't get you everywhere... with some physical education-(slapping Asuka) slap slap slap slap slap slap slap slap...slap slap slap. ... "Anta-baka" "Anta-baka." You're the baka. Hm. ...Ahh, much better.
